issue_body_preview:
Steps to reproduce:
1. I first went to https://socialify.git.ci after Next.js 15 upgrade #450 and saw the version number in the footer has been updated to `v2.17.0` which is working as expected
2. Subsequently, I deployed more new versions
3. After refreshing the page, the footer is still showing
test_description_zh: 访问首页，观察页面底部 footer 区域显示的版本号。部署新版本后，刷新页面，再次检查 footer 中的版本号是否更新。
expected_result_zh: 每次部署新版本后刷新页面，footer 中显示的版本号应与最新部署的版本一致，不应显示旧的缓存版本号。
